meaning: n.瓮,缸,骨灰瓮,坟墓,茶水壶;Uniform Resource Name,统一资源命名
examples: Other items included a Lapita burial urn with modeled birds arranged on the rim as though peering down at the human remains sealed inside.
Afterward, I take the urn with me.
The service URN uniquely identifies the service.
In Russia, tea is prepared in tea rooms using a samovar, an urn of hot water.
Indeed, the urn that the remains were found in was also from Central Europe.
